query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "appo: agentic procedural policy optimization" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criterion (a) and (b) by measuring the performance of Proximal Policy Optimization (PPO), a core component of the user's "APPO" (Agentic Procedural Policy Optimization) mechanism, against an alternative evolutionary approach in a canonical robotics domain. Even though the user's question specifies "Agentic" and "Procedural" extensions, a literature review for this topic must include foundational or comparative studies of the base PPO algorithm's capabilities and limitations
